nasb.text: So I gave orders to bring into my presence all the wise men of Babylon, that they might make known to me the interpretation of the dream.

esv.text: So I made a decree that all the wise men of Babylon should be brought before me, that they might make known to me the interpretation of the dream.

cnv.text: 我就下令把巴比倫所有的智慧人，都帶到我面前來，要他們把夢的意思向我說明。

ccb.text: 我便召巴比伦所有的智者来为我解梦。
